title: Analyze Rosters: Clinic Scheduling Issues
description:
Did you know that scheduling errors account for nearly 25% of patient no-shows and missed appointments in clinics? Effective roster analysis can help identify these problems before they disrupt operations or impact patient satisfaction.

This Short Course was created to help healthcare administration professionals enhance their scheduling management capabilities to ensure operational efficiency and positive patient experiences in medical office environments.

By completing this course, you will be able to analyze appointment rosters to detect scheduling conflicts, administrative gaps, and workflow inefficiencies, allowing you to take proactive steps that keep clinic operations running smoothly and patient satisfaction high.

By the end of this 2-hour long course, you will be able to:

Analyze appointment rosters to identify and flag potential scheduling conflicts and administrative issues.

This course is unique because it focuses on real-world scheduling challenges and data-driven roster analysis, giving you the skills to transform appointment lists into actionable insights that improve clinic efficiency and reduce patient wait times.

To be successful in this project, you should have:

Basic medical office procedures knowledge
Understanding of appointment scheduling concepts
Familiarity with healthcare administrative terminology
Computer navigation skills
